task_text: Wie viel Geld haben wir seit Beginn von November 2025 mit der Servicezeile 'workflow  mapping and intake audit' verdient? Antworte nur mit einer Zahl.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per rulebook, read nested AGENTS in finance folders, then performed exact invoice line-item lookup.
function.outcome_justification: The three read invoice records since November 2025 that contain the exact service line each provide explicit line_eur amounts: 520 (INV-0006), 260 (INV-0007), and 420 (INV-0009). Their sum is 1200.
